hero.title: Professional & Compassionate

hero.introText: Our team of dedicated professionals is carefully selected for their expertise and profound compassion. Every caregiver at Caring Path is committed to providing respectful, high-quality care that honors the dignity and independence of your loved ones throughout Rhode Island.

about.heroSubtitle: Helping families feel confident in their choice for compassionate, professional care in Rhode Island.
about.tagline: Caring Path was born from something deeply personal.
about.para1: We are committed to becoming the gold standard in home care—not just through the services we provide, but through the way we treat every person we touch. For us, excellence begins from within. That's why we invest deeply in our caregivers, offering them the support, benefits, and respect they deserve. When our team feels valued, secure, and empowered, they are able to give their very best—every single day.
about.para2: Too often, home care no longer felt like home. Care became rushed. Impersonal. Focused on schedules instead of people.But the people receiving that care are not just patients or names on a chart. They are the parents in this photo. They are your parents. Our parents. The neighbor next door. The grandfather who still tells the same stories at dinner. The mother who spent her whole life caring for everyone else.
about.para3: People with dignity. Memories. Pride. A lifetime of love behind them. And we knew they deserved more. So we created Caring Path — a place built on compassion, trust, and respect for the people who once cared for all of us. We believe home care should protect the feeling of home: safe, familiar, peaceful, and filled with kindness. To us, this work is personal.
about.missionStatement: Because one day, every family hopes someone will care for the people they love with patience, gentleness, and heart.
about.closing: That is the path we chose to create.
about.missionText: To provide compassionate, personalized in-home care that helps families feel confident and secure in their choice, while enhancing the independence, dignity, and quality of life of those we serve.
about.visionText: To be a trusted leader in home care, recognized for building lasting relationships with families and delivering care that inspires confidence, peace of mind, and exceptional quality of life.
about.value1: Trust – We build strong, honest relationships with every family we serve.
about.value2: Compassion – We care with empathy, kindness, and genuine understanding.
about.value3: Reliability – Families can depend on us for consistent, high-quality care.
about.value4: Integrity – We act with transparency and uphold the highest ethical standards.
about.value5: Excellence – We are committed to delivering outstanding care every day.

partners.heroSubtitle: At Caring Path Home Health Services, we work closely with trusted organizations to ensure our clients receive comprehensive, coordinated, and high-quality care beyond basic home services.

p1.name: Core Bridge Alliance
p1.desc1: Caring Path Home Health Services has partnered with Core Bridge Alliance to strengthen and expand our care services. Through this partnership, clients gain access to food assistance programs, specialized support and community resources.
p1.desc2: This collaboration allows us to offer personalized navigation and coordination services to address additional needs and promote long-term well-being.

p2.name: Avangelina’s Cleaning Services
p2.tagline: A Clean Home Is the Best Start
p2.desc1: We also collaborate with Avangelina’s Cleaning Services to provide deep cleaning support when needed, especially before care services begin.
p2.desc2: This ensures a safe, comfortable, and healthy home environment for our clients.

partners.commitment: At Caring Path, we remain fully committed to providing compassionate, personalized, and dignified care. Our partnerships exist to enhance – not replace – the quality of care we deliver every day.

evaluation.heroSubtitle: At Caring Path Home Health Services, we work closely with trusted organizations to ensure our clients receive comprehensive, coordinated, and high-quality care beyond basic home services.

chap.name: CHAP Seal of Accreditation
chap.tagline: Issued by CHAP | Community Health Accreditation Partner
chap.desc1: CHAP Accreditation demonstrates this organization meets the industry’s highest nationally recognized Home Care standards. The rigorous evaluation by CHAP focuses on structure and function, quality of services and products, human and financial resources and long-term viability. Adherence to CHAP’s Standards leads to better quality care.
chap.desc2: This collaboration allows us to offer personalized navigation and coordination services to address additional needs and promote long-term well-being.

p2.name: Avangelina’s Cleaning Services
p2.tagline: A Clean Home Is the Best Start
p2.desc1: We also collaborate with Avangelina’s Cleaning Services to provide deep cleaning support when needed, especially before care services begin.
p2.desc2: This ensures a safe, comfortable, and healthy home environment for our clients.

footer.aboutText: Providing compassionate, personalized in-home care that enhances the independence and quality of life for our clients throughout Rhode Island.

katherine.name: Katherine Rosario
katherine.bio1: Meet Katherine—one of our dedicated CNA professionals at CaringPath.
katherine.bio2: Katherine began her journey with us as a temporary CNA and, through hard work and commitment, earned her permanent license. Since then, she has continued to go above and beyond for every client she serves.
katherine.bio3: Her clients truly love her for her dedication, compassion, and constant support. Katherine adapts seamlessly to changes in her clients' needs, always attentive and proactive in reporting their condition—giving families peace of mind and confidence in her care.
katherine.bio4: Katherine doesn't just show up—she stands on care, every single day. 💛

marchelis.name: Marchelis Figueroa
marchelis.bio1: Meet Marchelis—our very first team member and a true foundation of CaringPath.
marchelis.bio2: With over 10 years of experience, Marchelis has been with us since the beginning, always available, always willing, and always leading with heart. She serves both English and Spanish-speaking communities with compassion, making every client feel respected, comfortable, and cared for.
marchelis.bio3: Her work ethic and dedication are constantly praised, but what truly sets her apart is the love she puts into everything she does.
marchelis.bio4: Marchelis doesn't just provide care—she defines it.
